APPEARING FRO DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/24/22 IS CONTINUED TO 6/13/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER PARTIES' STIPULATION. ALL TRIAL RELATED DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY TO SERVE THE ORDER. NOTICE WAIVED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-26-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CAREY LEE AND BRAYER ELECTRIC COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUPPLEMENTAL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF RESTY MANUEL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THIS MOTION IS CONTINUED TO 6/2/22 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH EMAIL COURTESY COPY REQUIREMENTS. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
